calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion For Protective Order Re: Deposition Of Donald Harris
Off Calendar Jan-13-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert G. Engel Esq. of STEVENS, DRUMMOND & GIFFORD (925-944-5550), specially appearing for respondent / moving party Kelly-Moore Paint Co., Inc.
Oren Noah, Esq. and Kimberly Chu, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for petitioner / opposing party

RULING:
KELLY-MOORE PAINT COMPANY, INC.'S Motion For Protective Order Re: Deposition Of Donald Harris. Argued and the Court ordered the parties to proceed with taking the deposition of the petitioner and wait for the medical records to be released. Mr. Engel is to prepare an order for the court's signature. Judge: Harold Kahn, Matter not reported.

Ntc Of Hearing Re : Petition Of Sarah Harris To Perpetuate Testimony Of Donald Harris By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Dec-09-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Kimberly Chu, Esq., for Petitioner and moving party: Sarah Harris
Stephen E. Carlson, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Gravel Co and J. S. Guerin & Co.
Hillary H. Huter, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Bondex, Inc.
Robert G. Engel, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Kelly Moore Paint Company, Inc.
Angus M. Macleod, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: CSK Auto, Inc.
Camille K. Fong, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Kaiser Gypsum, Company

After hearing, Petition of Sarah Harris to perpetuate testimony of Donald Harris by videotaped deposition is taken under submission pursuant to Local Rule 3.6. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
